response.justification: Mohammed has extensive technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse projects, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML modeling, and client-facing technical advisory — key for this role — and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the required C1 level.
strengths: Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple public libraries
Proven full-stack expertise across languages, platforms, and DevOps tooling
Demonstrated mentorship through workshops, courses, and team collaboration
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or requirements management experience
Lacks documented experience in client advisory, risk/compliance, or project oversight at executive level
